# How I Learned to Prompt Claude Code Better - Four Modes

## Mode 1: Build Mode
Purpose: "Give me something I can use"
Use when you know what you want. Keep requirements specific and short.

## Mode 2: Debug Mode
Purpose: "Why is this happening?"
Provide sufficient context: logs, versions, minimal code examples.

## Mode 3: Rewrite/Critique Mode
Purpose: "Make this better"
Separate critique from rewrite. First ask "what's wrong", then ask for improvement.

## Mode 4: Learning Mode
Purpose: "Teach me as a beginner"
Clearly state your knowledge level and goals.

## Key insight
Don't mix modes in a single prompt. Asking for learning + improvement + building in one prompt produces scattered output.
